name: Imagineering Finishing Technologies
message: Imagineering Finishing Technologies (IFT) is the industry KnowledgeSource for metal finishing solutions. Through our commitment to the principles of Total Quality Management, IFT provides high-performance surface finishing solutions for a robust range of markets that address the most exacting application requirements. Our focus on quality, accountability, applications expertise and integrity is trusted and relied upon by leading manufacturers and OEMs. IFT facilities are certified to world-class quality and environmental standards, and we are one of the first metal finishing companies in the world to achieve TS-16949, ISO 9001, AS 9100 and Nadcap quality program accreditations, in addition to attaining the ISO 14001 Environmental Management System certification.
